title: Galt Washable PVA Glue for Crafting, 500ml - Slime Making Easy Clean Kids Glue, Washes Out of Clothes - Clear Arts and Crafts Glue for Paper, Card, Wood and Fabrics - Children Safe, Ages 3 Years Plus
features: HIGH QUALITY GLUE: The 500ml clear PVA glue is perfect for all your crafting needs, It is versatile, suitable for use on paper, card, wood, and fabrics or can be used as a glaze for painted models
GLUE FOR SLIME MAKING: Designed as the ideal slime glue for kids creations, Our PVA glue for slime is the go-to choice for DIY slime, Mix with our slime set for the ultimate slime making experience
WHITE GLUE WITH CLEAR FINISH: The childrens glue dries to a clear finish for maintaining the original look of your crafts, The craft glue also helps to ensure a neat finish on your art projects
PRACTICAL and VERSATILE: This clear glue for slime doubles as an arts and crafts glue, Mix with paint for an interesting painting medium, Our PVA glue for slime and crafting activities is a must-have
EASY CLEAN: A mess-free solution, its easy to clean and washes out of clothing, Just soak the dry glue in cold water with a little detergent to remove any residue, Safe for kids ages 3 years plus
description: From the manufacturer Young Art - Art & Craft Materials range by Galt Ignite your child's imagination with Galt Toys' Young Art range, a classic collection of art and craft materials designed to inspire creativity and learning. Each product in this line-up is a testament to Galt Toys' rich heritage of fostering educational play and artistic expression in young children. Crafted with safety and usability in mind, our Young Art range includes the kid-friendly Washable PVA Glue, perfect for all types of crafts. It's versatile, easy to clean, and a great tool for exploring creativity. Complement the glue with our colourful Washable Pens, designed to let little artists create vibrant masterpieces without worry about stains or messes. The creativity doesn't stop there! Our Paint Brushes are easy to hold for tiny hands, and our Giant Chalks are perfect for big outdoor drawings. With our Safety Scissors, even cutting becomes an opportunity for learning and development. Dive into sensory play with our non-toxic Finger Paints, encouraging tactile exploration and colour recognition. Each item in the Young Art range is more than just a tool; it's an invitation to create, learn, and grow. Trust Galt Toys, a leader in educational play since 1836, to deliver products that are as fun as they are educational. Let your little ones express their creativity and watch their imaginations soar with the Galt Young Art range.
